mapper.insert: insert into sys_user(username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, status) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{status});
mapper.select: select sr.* from sys_role sr join sys_user_role sur on sr.id = sur.role_id where sur.user_id = #{userId} and sr.deleted = 0 and sr.status = 'ACTIVE';

select distinct sp.* from sys_permission sp join sys_role_permission srp on sp.id = srp.permission_id join sys_user_role sur on srp.role_id = sur.role_id join sys_role sr on sr.id = sur.role_id where sur.user_id = #{userId} and sp.deleted = 0 and sp.status = 'ACTIVE' and sr.deleted = 0 and sr.status = 'ACTIVE';
